summary: ESPN2 MVPD Messaging - Unauthorized and Not Entitled
description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND ESPN2 broadcasters are assigned
AND the user doesn't have the following entitlements: MLBALL, MLBVIDEOADOBEPASS, MLBVIDEOAR
AND the user is unauthorized for ESPN2 MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = false
AND the AWAY (National) feed level espn2AuthRequired = true

User types: atBat/Audio, Free, Anonymous users

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a game tile for an ESPN2 Postseason game tile
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Select modal displays
AND ESPN2 MVPD messaging displays in the Feed Select modal
